title: Netherite Diamond Switch
description: This recourse pack switches all of the diamond and netherite names and textures for all the people who think diamond is just better!
body:
Ever wondered what it’d be like if diamond and netherite switched places?
Now you can find out! This simple yet mind-bending texture pack completely swaps the textures of diamond and netherite items, tools, armor, and blocks.

 **What’s Swapped**
 
- Diamond ↔ Netherite tools and weapons

- Diamond ↔ Netherite armor

- Diamond ↔ Netherite blocks and ores

- Items and icons in inventories

You’ll mine for “netherite” and craft “diamond” armor — but it’ll all _look_ reversed!

 **Compatibility**

- Works on Minecraft Java Edition (all versions 1.21 or above for now).

- Fully compatible with OptiFine, Fabric, and Vanilla.

- No mods required — pure resource pack fun!

**Smithing Templates (Trim Pack)**

![Smithing Templates (Trim Pack)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97576bf91139c420463a766efe82d5bd37eeca4a.png)!

**Smithing Templates (NoTrim Pack)**
